---
title: "Talks"
---

## Conferences, talks, and posters

### Deep networks learn to parse uniform-depth context-free languages from local statistics

Poster, 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), Seoul, South Korea.  
Wednesday, July 8, 2026, 5:00 PM--6:45 PM KST, Hall A #4607.

Authors: Jack T. Parley, Francesco Cagnetta, and Matthieu Wyart.

Links:

- [ICML poster page](https://icml.cc/virtual/2026/poster/61860)
- [Code](https://github.com/jackparley/learn_to_parse)


### Mean-field mechanical noise approach to plasticity in amorphous solids can capture essential long-range physics

Oral contribution, Avalanche Conference 2024, Espoo, Finland.

### Mean field theory of the brittle yielding transition under uniform shear

Oral contribution, CECAM Flagship Workshop, Lausanne, Switzerland, May 2023.

### Time-dependent rheology of amorphous materials

Oral contribution, STATPHYS satellite workshop, Bariloche, Argentina, July 2019.

### Amorphous materials with broad mechanical noise

Oral contribution, STATPHYS 27, Buenos Aires, Argentina, July 2019.
